Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me create a detailed summary report.

## Comprehensive Analysis: Header Component Data Fetching

Based on thorough exploration of the header component directory at `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/` and related query files, here is the complete mapping of all data fetching calls:

---

### **1. PRIMARY DATA SOURCE: AggregateRoot (Server-Side, Page-Level)**

**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/api.tsx`
**Fetching:** Lines 12-35

- **API Endpoint:** `apiClient.aggregate.proxy.get()` with `theme: 'shiro'` parameter
- **Query Key:** `['aggregate', 'shiro', locale]`
- **Response Type:** `AggregateRootWithTheme<AppThemeConfig>`
- **Provided via:** `AggregationProvider` (injected at page root in `/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx`)
- **Cache:** Server-side TTL based on `appStaticConfig.cache.ttl.aggregation`

**Data Fields Used in Header Components:**

| Field | Component | Usage |
|-------|-----------|-------|
| `user.avatar` | `HomeDropdownContent`, `OwnerAvatar`, `UserAuth`, `AnimatedLogo`, `SiteOwnerAvatar` | Display site owner avatar image |
| `user.name` | `HomeDropdownContent`, `AuthjsLoginModalContent` | Display owner name |
| `categories` | `PostsDropdownContent`, `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Build post categories submenu; display category list with counts |
| `categories[].slug` | `PostsDropdownContent`, `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Category routing |
| `categories[].name` | `PostsDropdownContent`, `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Category display text |
| `categories[].count` | `PostsDropdownContent` | Display post count per category |
| `pageMeta` | `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Build home menu submenu with custom pages |
| `pageMeta[].slug` | `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Page routing |
| `pageMeta[].title` | `HeaderDataConfigureProvider` | Page display text |
| `seo.title` | `AuthjsLoginModalContent` | Login modal title |
| `theme.config` | (layout only) | Theme configuration |
| `url.webUrl` | (layout only) | Base URL |

---

### **2. CLIENT-SIDE QUERIES (useQuery)**

#### **2.1 Recent Notes Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/recent-notes-query.ts`
**Lines:** 11-21

- **Query Key:** `['nav-recent-notes', locale]`
- **Endpoint:** `client.note.getList(1, 4)` (fetch 4 recent notes from page 1)
- **Response Type:** `PaginateResult<NoteModel>`
- **Stale Time:** 5 minutes
- **Used By:** `NotesDropdownContent`

**Fields Used:**
- `noteList.data[]` array containing:
  - `nid` - Note ID
  - `title` - Note title
  - `created` - Creation date (for RelativeTime)

---

#### **2.2 Category Details Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/DropdownContents.tsx`
**Lines:** 104-109

```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['nav-category-posts', hoveredSlug],
  queryFn: () => apiClient.category.getCategoryByIdOrSlug(hoveredSlug!),
  enabled: !!hoveredSlug,
  staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['nav-category-posts', hoveredSlug]`
- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.category.getCategoryByIdOrSlug(slug)`
- **Triggers:** On category hover in Posts dropdown
- **Stale Time:** 5 minutes
- **Used By:** `PostsDropdownContent`

**Fields Used:**
- `categoryDetail.children` - Array of recent posts (max 4 displayed)
  - `post.id` - Post ID
  - `post.title` - Post title
  - `post.slug` - Post slug
  - `post.created` - Creation date

---

#### **2.3 Topics Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/DropdownContents.tsx`
**Lines:** 191-198

```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['nav-topics'],
  queryFn: async () => {
    const data = await apiClient.topic.getAll()
    return data.$serialized.data
  },
  staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 10,
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['nav-topics']`
- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.topic.getAll()`
- **Stale Time:** 10 minutes
- **Used By:** `NotesDropdownContent`

**Fields Used:**
- `topics` array containing:
  - `topic.slug` - Topic slug for routing
  - `topic.name` - Topic display name
  - `topic.icon` - Topic icon URL (optional)

---

#### **2.4 Timeline Top Entries Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/DropdownContents.tsx`
**Lines:** 296-301

```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['nav-top'],
  queryFn: async () =>
    (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
  staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['nav-top']`
- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)` - Fetch top 5 items
- **Stale Time:** 5 minutes
- **Used By:** `TimelineDropdownContent`

**Fields Used (merged from posts + notes):**
- `topData.posts[]`:
  - `post.id`, `post.title`, `post.created`
  - `post.category.slug` - For routing
  - `post.slug`
- `topData.notes[]`:
  - `note.id`, `note.title`, `note.created`

---

#### **2.5 Auth Providers Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/queries/hooks/authjs.tsx`
**Lines:** 16-31

```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['providers'],
  queryFn: () =>
    apiClient.proxy.auth.providers
      .get<{ data: AuthSocialProviders[] }>()
      .then((res) => res.data),
  refetchOnMount: 'always',
  meta: { persist: true },
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['providers']`
- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.proxy.auth.providers.get()`
- **Persist:** Yes (survives client navigations)
- **Used By:** `UserAuth` (OAuth login)

**Fields Used:**
- `providers` array - List of available OAuth providers

---

#### **2.6 Live Status Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/useLiveQuery.ts`
**Lines:** 6-28

```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['live-check'],
  queryFn: () =>
    fetch(`/api/bilibili/check_live?liveId=${liveId}`, {
      next: { revalidate: 1 },
    })
      .then((res) => res.json())
      .catch(() => null),
  select: useCallback((data: any) => !!data, []),
  refetchInterval: 1000 * 60,
  enabled: !!liveId,
  meta: { persist: false },
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['live-check']`
- **Endpoint:** `/api/bilibili/check_live?liveId={liveId}`
- **Refetch Interval:** Every 60 seconds
- **Enabled:** Only if `liveId` is configured
- **Selector:** Boolean (only checks if live, ignores details)
- **Used By:** `SiteOwnerAvatar`, `AnimatedLogo`

**Fields Used:**
- Response is converted to boolean via `select`

---

#### **2.7 Activity Data Query**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/Activity.tsx`
**Lines:** 42-99

**Part A - Icon & Description Fetch (Lines 42-54):**
```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['app-icon', 'app-desc'],
  queryFn: fetchJsonData,  // Fetches from CDN
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['app-icon', 'app-desc']`
- **Endpoint:** `https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/gh/Innei/reporter-assets@main/app-icon.json` and `app-desc.json`
- **Used By:** `Activity` context provider

**Part B - Live Activity Status (Lines 64-99):**
```javascript
useQuery({
  queryKey: ['activity'],
  queryFn: async () =>
    await apiClient.proxy(endpoint).post<{
      processName: string
      processInfo?: { name, iconBase64?, iconUrl?, description? }
      mediaInfo?: { title, artist, processName?, duration? }
    }>(),
  refetchInterval: 1000 * 5 * 60,  // Every 5 minutes
  refetchOnMount: 'always',
  retry: false,
  refetchOnReconnect: true,
  refetchOnWindowFocus: 'always',
  enabled: enable && isPageActive,
  meta: { persist: false },
})
```

- **Query Key:** `['activity']`
- **Endpoint:** Configured via `config.module.activity.endpoint` (default: `/fn/ps/update`)
- **Refetch:** Every 5 minutes + on mount/focus/reconnect
- **Enabled:** Only if activity module enabled and page is active
- **Used By:** `Activity` (displays current process and media being consumed)

**Fields Used:**
- `processInfo.name`, `.iconUrl`, `.iconBase64`, `.description` - Current app/process
- `mediaInfo.title`, `.artist`, `.duration`, `.processName` - Currently playing media

- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.proxy.fn.shiro.status.get()`
- **Refetch:** On window focus + mount (when page is active)
- **Used By:** `OwnerStatus`, `HomeDropdownContent`

**Fields Used (TOwnerStatus):**

- `desc` - Status description
- `untilAt` - When status expires (timestamp)

### **3. MUTATION CALLS (POST/DELETE)**

#### **3.1 Set Owner Status**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/OwnerStatus.tsx`
**Lines:** 181-194

```javascript
await apiClient.serverless.proxy.shiro.status.post({
  data: {
    emoji, desc, ttl: (calculated from user input + timeType)
  }
})
```

- **Endpoint:** `apiClient.serverless.proxy.shiro.status.post()`
- **Payload:** `{ emoji, desc, ttl }` (ttl is in seconds)

#### **3.2 Reset Owner Status**
**Lines:** 205

```javascript

```

#### **3.3 Owner Logout**
**Location:** `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/layout/header/internal/UserAuth.tsx`
**Lines:** 175-178

```javascript

await authClient.signOut().then((res) => {
  if (res.data?.success) window.location.reload()
})
```

- **Endpoints:** 
  - `apiClient.owner.logout()` - Local logout
  - `authClient.signOut()` - Auth.js signout

---

### **4. DATA FETCHING FLOW DIAGRAM**

```
Page Load (Server)
├─ fetchAggregationData() [cached]
│  └─ AggregateRoot with user, categories, pageMeta
│     └─ Provided via AggregationProvider
│
└─ Header Component Tree
   ├─ HeaderDataConfigureProvider
   │  └─ Consumes: user, categories, pageMeta
   │     └─ Builds: headerMenuConfig
   │
   ├─ HeaderContent
   │  └─ ForDesktop renders menu items
   │
   ├─ AnimatedLogo
   │  ├─ useLiveQuery() [refetch: 60s]
   │  ├─ Activity component
   │  │  ├─ Fetches: CDN app-icon.json, app-desc.json
   │  │  └─ Fetches: apiClient.proxy(endpoint).post() [refetch: 5min]
   │  └─ SiteOwnerAvatar
   │     └─ Consumes: user.avatar + liveQuery + ownerStatus
   │
   ├─ HeaderContent dropdowns
   │  ├─ HomeDropdownContent
   │  │  └─ Consumes: user, categories[].subMenu (from config)
   │  │
   │  ├─ PostsDropdownContent
   │  │  ├─ Consumes: categories
   │  │  └─ useQuery: getCategoryByIdOrSlug() [hover-triggered]
   │  │     └─ Returns: children (recent posts)
   │  │
   │  ├─ NotesDropdownContent
   │  │  ├─ useQuery: getRecentNotesQueryOptions() [stale: 5min]
   │  │  │  └─ Returns: 4 recent notes
   │  │  └─ useQuery: topic.getAll() [stale: 10min]
   │  │     └─ Returns: topics[]
   │  │
   │  ├─ TimelineDropdownContent
   │  │  └─ useQuery: aggregate.getTop(5) [stale: 5min]
   │  │     └─ Returns: top posts + notes (merged)
   │  │
   │  └─ MoreDropdownContent
   │     └─ Consumes: config.subMenu (static)
   │
   ├─ UserAuth
   │  ├─ useQuery: auth.providers.get() [refetch: mount]
   │  │  └─ For OAuth login button
   │  │
   │  ├─ OwnerAvatar
   │  │  └─ Consumes: user.avatar + ownerStatus
   │  │
   │  └─ OwnerStatus component
   │     └─ useQuery: shiro.status.get() [refetch: focus/mount]
   │        └─ Displays: emoji + desc + ttl
   │
   └─ HeaderDrawerContent (Mobile)
      └─ Consumes: headerMenuConfig from context
```

---

### **5. FIELD UTILIZATION SUMMARY**

| Data Field | Source | Components | Rendering Used |
|-----------|--------|-----------|-----------------|
| `user.avatar` | AggregateRoot | 5 components | Image `src` attribute |
| `user.name` | AggregateRoot | 2 components | Text display |
| `categories[]` | AggregateRoot | 2 components | Menu building, category list |
| `categories[].count` | AggregateRoot → Query | PostsDropdownContent | Post count badge |
| `pageMeta[]` | AggregateRoot | HeaderDataConfigureProvider | Home submenu items |
| `liveId` | AppConfig | useLiveQuery | Enable/disable live check |
| `isLiving` | useLiveQuery | 2 components | Avatar styling, goLive callback |
| `ownerStatus.emoji` | useQuery shiro.status | 2 components | Status emoji display |
| `ownerStatus.desc` | useQuery shiro.status | 2 components | Status description text |
| `ownerStatus.untilAt` | useQuery shiro.status | OwnerStatus | Expiration time display |
| `recentNotes` | useQuery nav-recent-notes | NotesDropdownContent | Note list + links |
| `topics` | useQuery nav-topics | NotesDropdownContent | Topic list + links |
| `topData` | useQuery nav-top | TimelineDropdownContent | Recent activity list |
| `categoryDetail.children` | useQuery nav-category-posts | PostsDropdownContent | Recent posts per category |
| `activity.process` | Activity context | HomeDropdownContent + tooltip | Current process display |
| `activity.media` | Activity context | Tooltip | Currently playing media |
| `providers` | useQuery auth.providers | UserAuth | OAuth provider buttons |

---

### **6. KEY OBSERVATIONS**

1. **Server-Side Foundation:** All base data (user, categories, pageMeta) comes from `AggregateRoot` fetched server-side and injected via context—no client-side re-fetching
2. **Hover-Driven Queries:** Category posts only fetch on user hover to minimize network calls
3. **Cache Strategies:** 
   - 5-minute stale time for most content queries
   - 10-minute stale time for topics (less volatile)
   - Activity refetches every 5 minutes + on focus
   - Live check refetches every 60 seconds
4. **Activity Status:** Dual-fetch pattern—icons from CDN + live status from custom endpoint
5. **No Unused Fields:** All fetched fields are actively rendered or used for routing/logic

This comprehensive mapping shows the header is well-optimized with server-side SSR for initial load, lazy client queries for interactive content, and strategic cache invalidation based on data volatility.

```text
   277→          {t('nav_dropdown_view_all_notes')}
   278→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   279→        <NavigationMenu.Link
   280→          closeOnClick
   281→          className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500 transition hover:text-accent"
   282→          render={<Link href="/notes/series" />}
   283→        >
   284→          {t('nav_dropdown_view_all_topics')}
   285→        </NavigationMenu.Link>
   286→      </div>
   287→    </div>
   288→  )
   289→}
   290→
   291→// === Timeline: Category list + recent entries ===
   292→export const TimelineDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   293→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   294→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   295→
   296→  const { data: topData } = useQuery({
   297→    queryKey: ['nav-top'],
   298→    queryFn: async () =>
   299→      (await apiClient.aggregate.getTop(5)).$serialized as AggregateTop,
   300→    staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
   301→  })
   302→
   303→  const recentEntries = mergeAndSortTopEntries(topData)
   304→
   305→  return (
   306→    <div className="w-[320px] p-2.5">
   307→      {/* Top: subMenu items horizontal */}
   308→      <div className="flex gap-1">
   309→        {items.map((item) => {
   310→          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   311→          return (
   312→            <NavigationMenu.Link
   313→              closeOnClick
   314→              className="flex flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-[13px] transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent"
   315→              key={item.path}
   316→              render={
   317→                isExternal ? (
   318→                  <a
   319→                    href={item.path}
   320→                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
   321→                    target="_blank"
   322→                  />
   323→                ) : (
   324→                  <Link href={item.path} />
   325→                )
   326→              }
   327→            >
   328→              {!!item.icon && (
   329→                <span className="flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-sm opacity-70">
   330→                  {item.icon}
   331→                </span>
   332→              )}
   333→              <span>
   334→                {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   335→              </span>
   336→            </NavigationMenu.Link>
   337→          )
   338→        })}
   339→      </div>
   340→
   341→      {/* Bottom: recent entries */}
   342→      <div className="mt-2 border-t border-neutral-200/60 pt-2 dark:border-neutral-700/60">
   343→        <div className="mb-1.5 text-[10px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-neutral-400">
   344→          {t('nav_dropdown_recent_activity')}
   345→        </div>
   346→        <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
   347→          {recentEntries.map((entry) => (
   348→            <NavigationMenu.Link
   349→              closeOnClick
   350→              className="rounded-xl bg-neutral-100/60 px-2.5 py-2 transition hover:bg-accent/5 hover:text-accent dark:bg-neutral-800/40"
   351→              key={entry.id}
   352→              render={<Link href={entry.href} />}
   353→            >
   354→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   355→                <div className="truncate text-[13px] leading-snug">
   356→                  {entry.title}
   357→                </div>
   358→                <span className="ml-2 shrink-0 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   359→                  {entry.type === 'post' ? t('nav_posts') : t('nav_notes')}
   360→                </span>
   361→              </div>
   362→              <div className="mt-0.5 text-[10px] text-neutral-400">
   363→                <RelativeTime date={entry.created} />
   364→              </div>
   365→            </NavigationMenu.Link>
   366→          ))}
   367→          {recentEntries.length === 0 && (
   368→            <div className="py-4 text-center text-[12px] text-neutral-400">
   369→              ...
   370→            </div>
   371→          )}
   372→        </div>
   373→      </div>
   374→    </div>
   375→  )
   376→}
   377→
   378→interface TimelineEntry {
   379→  created: string
   380→  href: string
   381→  id: string
   382→  title: string
   383→  type: 'post' | 'note'
   384→}
   385→
   386→function mergeAndSortTopEntries(
   387→  topData: AggregateTop | undefined,
   388→): TimelineEntry[] {
   389→  if (!topData) return []
   390→  const entries: TimelineEntry[] = []
   391→
   392→  for (const post of topData.posts ?? []) {
   393→    entries.push({
   394→      id: post.id,
   395→      title: post.title,
   396→      created: post.created,
   397→      href: `/posts/${post.category.slug}/${post.slug}`,
   398→      type: 'post',
   399→    })
   400→  }
   401→  for (const note of topData.notes ?? []) {
   402→    entries.push({
   403→      id: note.id,
   404→      title: note.title,
   405→      created: note.created,
   406→      href: buildNotePath(note),
   407→      type: 'note',
   408→    })
   409→  }
   410→
   411→  entries.sort(
   412→    (a, b) => new Date(b.created).getTime() - new Date(a.created).getTime(),
   413→  )
   414→  return entries.slice(0, 4)
   415→}
   416→
   417→// === More: Single column with descriptions ===
   418→export const MoreDropdownContent: FC<DropdownProps> = ({ section }) => {
   419→  const t = useTranslations('common')
   420→  const items = section.subMenu || []
   421→
   422→  return (
   423→    <div className="p-2">
   424→      <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5">
   425→        {items.map((item) => {
   426→          const isExternal = item.path.startsWith('http')
   427→          return (
   428→            <NavigationMenu.Link
   429→              closeOnClick
   430→              className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 text-left transition hover:bg-accent/5"
   431→              key={item.path}
   432→              render={
   433→                isExternal ? (
   434→                  <a
   435→                    href={item.path}
   436→                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
   437→                    target="_blank"
   438→                  />
   439→                ) : (
   440→                  <Link href={item.path} />
   441→                )
   442→              }
   443→            >
   444→              {!!item.icon && (
   445→                <span className="flex w-5 shrink-0 items-center justify-center text-base opacity-70">
   446→                  {item.icon}
   447→                </span>
   448→              )}
   449→              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
   450→                <div className="text-[13px]">
   451→                  {item.titleKey ? t(item.titleKey as any) : item.title}
   452→                </div>
   453→                {(item.descriptionKey || item.description) && (
   454→                  <div className="text-[11px] text-neutral-500">
   455→                    {item.descriptionKey
   456→                      ? t(item.descriptionKey as any)
   457→                      : item.description}
   458→                  </div>
   459→                )}
   460→              </div>
   461→            </NavigationMenu.Link>
   462→          )
   463→        })}
   464→      </div>
   465→    </div>
   466→  )
   467→}
   468→
   469→export const dropdownTypeMap: Record<string, FC<DropdownProps>> = {
   470→  Home: HomeDropdownContent,
   471→  Post: PostsDropdownContent,
   472→  Note: NotesDropdownContent,
   473→  Timeline: TimelineDropdownContent,
   474→  More: MoreDropdownContent,
   475→}
   476→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```typescript
import type { NoteModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'

type RecentNoteFields = Pick<NoteModel, 'nid' | 'title' | 'created' | 'slug'>
const recentNoteSelect: (keyof NoteModel)[] = ['nid', 'title', 'created', 'slug']

type NoteClient = {
  note: {
    getList: (
      page?: number,
      perPage?: number,
      options?: { select?: (keyof NoteModel)[] },
    ) => Promise<{
      $serialized: PaginateResult<RecentNoteFields>
    }>
  }
}

export const getRecentNotesQueryOptions = (
  locale: string,
  client: NoteClient,
) => ({
  queryKey: ['nav-recent-notes', locale],
  queryFn: async () => {
    const data = await client.note.getList(1, 4, { select: recentNoteSelect })
    return data.$serialized
  },
  staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5,
})

```
